# Scalper — Product Requirements Document

## Overview

Scalper is a trading platform that provides real-time portfolio management,
charting, and trade execution capabilities for retail investors.

This document defines the scope of the initial release (V1) and planned
follow-up features.

## Goals

- Provide a fast, reliable trading experience
- Support OAuth2 login for seamless onboarding
- Deliver real-time P&L and charting
- Enable CSV export for compliance and personal use

## Non-Functional Requirements

| Ref | Requirement |
|-----|-------------|
| NFR-1 | Page load time < 2 seconds |
| NFR-2 | 99.9% uptime SLA |
| NFR-3 | SOC 2 compliance |

These are not user stories and should be ignored by the extractor.

## User Stories

| ID | User Story | Priority | Owner |
|----|-----------|----------|-------|
| 1 | As a user, I want to log in using Google or Microsoft OAuth2 so that I don't need a separate password. | High | Auth Team |
| 1.1 | As a user, I want to enable two-factor authentication via an authenticator app so that my account is more secure. | Medium | Auth Team |
| 1.2 | As a user, I want to reset my password via an email link so that I can recover access to my account. | Medium | Auth Team |
| 2 | As a user, I want to see my live profit and loss in the portfolio view, updated every 30 seconds, so that I can make timely decisions. | High | Portfolio Team |
| 2.1 | As a user, I want to switch between 1D, 1W, 1M, 3M, 1Y, and ALL time periods on any chart so that I can analyze trends over different horizons. | Medium | Charts Team |

Note: rows without valid numeric identifiers should be ignored:

| ID | User Story | Priority | Owner |
|----|-----------|----------|-------|
| US-001 | This row has a non-numeric identifier and should be skipped. | Low | — |
| F1 | This row also has a non-numeric identifier. | Low | — |

## Technical Architecture

This section contains a table that should NOT be extracted as user stories.

| Component | Technology | Notes |
|-----------|-----------|-------|
| Frontend | React 18 | SPA with TypeScript |
| Backend | Go 1.21 | gRPC services |
| Database | PostgreSQL 15 | With TimescaleDB extension |
| Cache | Redis 7 | Session store + rate limiting |

## Appendix

Additional context and reference materials are available in the shared
Google Drive folder linked in the project wiki.
